seo.title: Barber Shop Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your barbershop. Route unhappy clients to private feedback before it hits Google. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Barber Shops
hero.subheading: Most clients don’t think to leave a review after a great cut. ReviewFlo helps you ask at the right time, without feeling pushy.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Barber Shop Faces

items.heading: Happy clients leave with a fade, not a review
items.body: They’re already thinking about their next stop. Reviews aren’t top of mind.

items.heading: One bad review can scare off walk-ins
items.body: A single 1-star can sit at the top and change how new clients choose.

items.heading: Asking in the chair feels awkward
items.body: Most barbers don’t want to interrupt the vibe to ask for a review.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Barber Shops

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the appointment
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link when they’re checking out.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they message you instead of posting publicly.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Keeps the shop vibe intact
items.body: Requests go out after the cut, not mid-conversation.

items.heading: Catches issues before they hit Google
items.body: Unhappy clients can tell you directly so you can make it right.

items.heading: Works for walk-ins and regulars
items.body: Send the same link every time, whether it’s a new client or a weekly regular.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Will clients actually leave reviews for a haircut?
items.a: Yes, when you make it easy and ask right after the appointment.

items.q: What happens if someone is unhappy?
items.a: They rate 1–4 stars and send you a private message instead of going to Google.

items.q: Do I need special software or a POS integration?
items.a: No. You can send requests manually by text or email, and start immediately.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same core flow for review requests and private feedback. ReviewFlo is priced for small shops.

items.q: Can I use this for multiple barbers or chairs?
items.a: Yes. You can use one shop link, and scale up as your team grows.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Barber Shop Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first request goes out in under 5 minutes.
